name: Rocky Road Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, over hot (not boiling) water, melt morsels with sweetened condensed milk. Remove from heat.
2. In a large bowl, combine marshmallows, nuts and raisins; stir in chocolate mixture.
3. Drop by spoonfuls onto wax paper-lined baking sheets.
4. Chill 2 hours or until firm.
5. Store loosely covered in a cool dry place.
